description:
You are a Platform Engineer automating a weekly infrastructure health report. Create an executable shell script at /home/ga/reports/generate_reports.sh that uses the Graphite Render API (http://localhost/render) to download three specific PNG graphs to the /home/ga/reports/ directory.

Graph 1: Fleet CPU Overview
- Save to: /home/ga/reports/fleet_cpu_overview.png
- Targets: alias(servers.ec2_instance_1.cpu.utilization,'EC2 Instance 1'), alias(servers.ec2_instance_2.cpu.utilization,'EC2 Instance 2'), alias(servers.ec2_instance_3.cpu.cloudwatch_utilization,'EC2 Instance 3')
- Time range: from=-7d
- Display: title=Fleet CPU Overview, width=800, height=400, format=png

Graph 2: Disk Write Rate
- Save to: /home/ga/reports/disk_write_rate.png
- Targets: derivative(servers.ec2_instance_1.disk.write_bytes), derivative(servers.ec2_instance_2.disk.write_bytes)
- Time range: from=-3d
- Display: title=Disk Write Rate (bytes/sec), width=800, height=400, format=png

Graph 3: Temperature Analysis
- Save to: /home/ga/reports/temperature_analysis.png
- Targets: alias(servers.datacenter.machine_temperature,'Raw Temperature'), alias(movingAverage(servers.datacenter.machine_temperature,10),'Smoothed (MA-10)')
- Time range: from=-7d
- Display: title=Machine Temperature Analysis, width=800, height=400, format=png
